name: claude-fusion
description: Automatically consults Claude Code through synchronous, read-only Codex hooks for planning and review.

interface.shortDescription: Automatic read-only Claude planning and review
interface.longDescription: Keeps Codex primary while synchronously consulting Claude Code for structured pre-task analysis, bounded subagent review, and final diff review. Claude receives read-only tools and filtered repository context.
defaultPrompt: Implement this complex coding task with automatic Claude Fusion review.
